name: Staff of Adornment
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can hold up to 3 objects weighing 1 lb or less to float around the tip.

name: Staff of Birdcalls
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can create bird calls within 60 feet.

name: Staff of Flowers
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can cause a flower to sprout from the staff.

name: Staff of the Adder
stat_impact: Permanent: Functions as a magical quarterstaff. Can animate the head into a snake for 1d12 poison damage.

name: Staff of the Python
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can transform into a Giant Constrictor Snake.

name: Staff of Charming
stat_impact: Permanent: Grants Advantage on saving throws against being charmed while held. Can expend charges to cast spells.

name: Staff of Healing
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can expend charges to cast Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, or Mass Cure Wounds.

name: Staff of Swarming Insects
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can expend charges to create clouds of insects or insect swarms.

name: Staff of the Woodlands
stat_impact: Permanent: +2 bonus to spell attack rolls and to attack/damage rolls with the staff. Can cast various druidic spells.

name: Staff of Withering
stat_impact: Permanent: Functions as a magical quarterstaff. Can expend charges to deal necrotic damage and disadvantage on Con/Str saves.

name: Staff of Fire
stat_impact: Permanent: Grants Resistance to Fire damage while held. Can expend charges to cast fire-based spells.

name: Staff of Frost
stat_impact: Permanent: Grants Resistance to Cold damage while held. Can expend charges to cast cold-based spells.

name: Staff of Power
stat_impact: Permanent: +2 bonus to AC, Saving Throws, and spell attack rolls. Functions as a +2 magical quarterstaff.

name: Staff of Striking
stat_impact: Permanent: +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls with the staff. Can expend charges to deal extra force damage.

name: Staff of Thunder and Lightning
stat_impact: Permanent: +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls with the staff. Can use specific lightning and thunder actions.

name: Staff of the Magi
stat_impact: Permanent: +2 bonus to spell attack rolls. Advantage on saving throws against spells. Can absorb spells. Can cast many spells.

name: Staff of Dunamancy
stat_impact: Permanent: +2 bonus to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Can cast specific dunamancy spells.

name: Staff of Defense
stat_impact: Permanent: +1 bonus to AC while held. Can cast Mage Armor or Shield using charges.
